context_only: # Spec Review — AI-Powered Specification Quality Check

tasks.title: Create tp review command skeleton
tasks.acceptance: newReviewCmd registered in root.go. Accepts spec path arg. Parses spec via existing lint infrastructure (parseSpecFile). Returns JSON shell.

tasks.title: Generate implementer review prompt
tasks.acceptance: Prompt generated with: role=implementer, category=completeness. Per-table questions (heading, rows, line). Per-numbered-list questions (items, range). Per-code-block question. Generic edge case question. Spec content embedded.

tasks.title: Generate tester review prompt
tasks.acceptance: Prompt generated with: role=tester, category=ambiguity. Per-table-row testability question. Per-numbered-item boundary question. Vague language detection question.

tasks.title: Generate architect review prompt
tasks.acceptance: Prompt generated with: role=architect, category=consistency. Contradiction check. 'What doesn't change' check. Cross-reference multiple lists. Performance question.

tasks.title: Assemble review JSON output
tasks.acceptance: tp review outputs JSON with: spec path, structured_elements (from lint), prompts array (3 prompts), review_loop instructions (max_rounds, convergence, instruction text). Finding format documented in each prompt.

tasks.title: Write review command tests
tasks.acceptance: Tests: basic output structure, 3 prompts generated, spec-aware questions reference tables/lists, empty spec produces minimal prompts, prompts contain spec content, finding format documented in prompt text.

tasks.title: Update SKILL.md workflow A
tasks.acceptance: Workflow A step 2 is tp review with sub-agent instructions. Review loop described: spawn 3 sub-agents, collect findings, revise if high-severity, converge in 2 rounds.

tasks.title: Update CLAUDE.md and README
tasks.acceptance: tp review listed in CLAUDE.md commands and self-development workflow. README has tp review in Spec & Validation section.
